indications.text:
SEMPREX-D Capsules are indicated for relief of symptoms associated with seasonal allergic rhinitis
such as sneezing, rhinorrhea, pruritus, lacrimation, and nasal congestion. SEMPREX-D Capsules should
be administered when both the antihistaminic activity of acrivastine and the nasal decongestant acti...
